from typing import Any, Dict, List


def find_matching_users(users: List[Dict[str, Any]], filters: Dict[str, Any]) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
    results = []
    filter_items = filters.items()
    for user in users:
        match = True
        for key, value in filter_items:
            if user.get(key) != value:
                match = False
                break
        if match:
            results.append(user)
    return results


def summarize_metrics(metrics: List[Dict[str, float]]) -> Dict[str, float]:
    totals: Dict[str, float] = {}
    for metric in metrics:
        for key, value in metric.items():
            totals[key] = totals.get(key, 0) + value
    return totals
